title: The Pleiadians
summary: The people of the Seven Sisters — who, the sessions claim, brought Earth its current Moon.
markdown:
The **Pleiadians** carry one of the archive's most startling single claims: that they
**brought Earth its current Moon**. In the March 14, 2020 interview the Moon is described as
"a Reptilian defense planetoid" — a fragment of the destroyed world whose remains form the
asteroid belt (the planet the sessions call Tiamat, Maldek, or
[Marduk Belona](/lore/nibiru-marduk/)) — towed here by Pleiadians "to balance the Earth's
environment" after the cataclysms. Earth, the same account adds, **once had two moons** — and
the fall of the other one figures in the destruction of [Atlantis](/lore/atlantis/).

The Pleiades appear again as a destination: the [Andromedan Council](/lore/andromedan-council/)
states that the **Maya departed Earth around 20,000 years ago into the Pleiades** — "the seven
sisters" — with Pleiadian help, and that the high councils mentor Earth *through* the
Pleiadian and [Sirian](/lore/sirians/) councils, being forbidden to intervene directly.

Between the towed Moon, the Mayan exodus, and their seat among the mentoring councils, the
Pleiadians emerge from the sessions as humanity's logistical elder siblings — the lineage that
moves worlds, ferries peoples, and passes messages down from heights we cannot yet visit.
